sections.paragraph:
masc. an end, a word belonging to the later Hebrew [but see the books in which it occurs], when verging towards the Aramean , i.q. קֵץ Ecc 3:11 7:2 12:13 2Ch 20:16 used of the uttermost part of a host, Joe 2:20. Root סוּף.

סוף

emphat. סֹופָא Chald. id., Dan 4:8, 19 6:27 7:28 .
